interactionPlan.concept: Illustration of the motion field observed with lateral translation of a camera with no rotation.

interactions.label: Adjust Camera Speed
interactions.teaches: How variations in camera speed affect the velocity of points in the image plane.

interactions.label: Depth of Objects
interactions.teaches: Manipulating object distances to show the depth effect on motion speed (parallax).

interactions.label: Toggle Parallax Effect
interactions.teaches: Demonstrates how parallax results in varying perceived speeds of objects at different depths.

interactions.label: Animate Lateral Camera Motion
interactions.teaches: Visualize the overall effect of lateral motion on a scene, reinforcing parallax understanding.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Initial viewpoint from above and slightly behind the moving camera, focusing on the scene and motion field.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure that animations clearly demonstrate variations in motion speed due to depth differences, particularly highlighting the near-stationary appearance of distant objects.

gpt-4o.notes: The generated figure focuses on depth and camera positioning rather than the linear sequence of envelopes and arrows.
